title: Up to 697,000 jobs at risk from artificial intelligence and new economy, says Ramanan
description: KUALA LUMPUR: A total of 42,807 people have lost jobs so far this year and up to 697,000 jobs could be at risk of being affected by artificial intelligence, the digital and green economy if they do not reskill.

title: Asia Tech Shares Swing Wildly as A.I. Jitters Persist
description: The turbulence in Asia’s chip-dominated stock markets highlighted how heavily global equities have come to depend on enthusiasm for artificial intelligence.
content:
It was another dizzying day for Asia’s technology shares.

title: Nandan Nilekani Says AI Will Amplify Infosys, Not Replace IT Services Model
description: Infosys Chairman Nandan Nilekani said artificial intelligence will strengthen rather than disrupt IT services firms that adapt quickly. Speaking at the AGM, he highlighted that enterprise complexity, legacy system upgrades, and AI integration will sustain demand. Infosys is actively working on AI initiatives with most of its top clients
content: Infosys chairman Nandan Nilekani has sought to ease concerns about artificial intelligence (AI) disrupting the traditional IT services industry, stating that the technology will ultimately enhance companies that are able to adapt quickly rather than ... [2776 chars]

title: Talk of a bubble is an 'insult to AI' says SoftBank's Son
description: Masayoshi Son, SoftBank's CEO, dismissed concerns about an AI bubble, calling it an "insult to AI" and emphasising its nascent stage with vast potential. He reiterated SoftBank's role as an "egg-laying factory" and expressed frustration over the company's market valuation compared to its asset value. Son, 68, plans to lead the company into his 70s to achieve "artificial super intelligence."
content:
